title: Vendor in latest containers/image and containers/storage
body:
Made necessary changes to functions to include contex.Context wherever needed

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: This makes me very sad, but there's no getting around it if it's in c/storage and c/image. LGTM.

:pushpin: Commit b1a6cdf has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan b1a6cdf182f9a11be38d32789f30fb3e3e40fa52 -->
fix up the issue in the tests and LGTM. Thanks!
